title: Luscious Venezuelan Asparagus Salad
description: A vibrant Venezuelan asparagus salad that blends earthy spears with rendered pork fat, crumbly cheese, and bright citrus, served on a natural agave leaf for a romantic date-night dish.
instructions: Trim the asparagus spears and blanch them in boiling water for 2 minutes until bright green and slightly tender, then immediately transfer to ice water to stop cooking.
Drain the asparagus and pat dry, then slice each spear into 1.5 cm pieces.
Heat a small skillet over medium heat, add the rendered pork fat, and let it melt completely, infusing the fat with the flavor of the pork.
Toss the sliced asparagus with the hot rendered pork fat until evenly coated, letting the heat from the fat lightly toast the spears.
Place the warm asparagus onto a clean agave leaf and sprinkle with the crumbly queso fresco, toasted pumpkin seeds, chopped cilantro, oregano, and sea salt.
Drizzle the freshly squeezed lime juice over the salad, adding a bright citrus finish that balances the richness of the render fat and cheese.
Gently toss the salad to combine all the flavors, ensuring each asparagus piece is coated with cheese, seeds, and lime.
Serve immediately on the agave leaf for an elegant presentation, ideal for a date-night meal.
